title: Meshtastic app interface to Zephyr firmware
description: Why this exists: users with existing Meshtastic mobile/desktop workflows need a compatibility-oriented interface path from Meshtastic apps into LICHEN Zephyr firmware, even though the mesh protocol itself is not Meshtastic-compatible. What needs to be done: define and implement the Zephyr-side app interface that Meshtastic clients can speak over the appropriate local transport (BLE UART, serial, or IPC as applicable), map Meshtastic app requests onto LICHEN local CoAP resources and mesh actions, expose identity/config/status/message paths, and document unsupported Meshtastic features clearly. Preserve LICHEN protocol behavior and do not imply RF interoperability with Meshtastic nodes. Acceptance criteria: transport choice and framing are documented; request/response mapping table exists; config/status/message/key flows are tested; unsupported commands return explicit errors; mobile app smoke test path is documented; two code-review passes are completed before closure.
